question: What color is the bold text 'BRUCE THE BORDER COLLIE' displayed at the top of the frame? A. Blue B. Red C. White D. Black
How many words are in the vertical blue text displayed on the right side of the frame?
What color is the clothing worn by the person hiking in the snow? A. Dark B. Red C. Blue D. White
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A black and white Border Collie stands in deep snow with red and blue text overlays nearby. A person wearing dark clothing walks uphill away from the camera through deep snow. A small black and white dog walks alongside the person. Deep footprints trail behind them in the white snow. A thin vertical pole stands on the right side of the frame.

Describe the sequence of movements and visible elements as the scene progresses from the title card to the final shot.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black and white Border Collie stands still under title text; at 6s, a person wearing a dark jacket walks down a snow-covered hill; at 8s, the person hikes uphill carrying a large backpack; at 12s, the person stops standing behind a snow-covered bush; at 18s, a dark-colored dog walks away leaving deep footprints in the snow.

question: What change occurs in this segment? A. A bird appears on the snow. B. A dog shakes snow off its paw. C. A dog lies on the ground. D. A person starts holding a dog.

What does the person wearing camouflage pants do with the black and white dog standing next to them in the snow?
canonical_answer: The person holds the snow-covered black and white dog in their arms.
